title: Glasswing UAS Takes Flight
description: NAU's autonomous Glasswing drone is designed to fly beneath dense forest canopies, where GPS is unreliable and conventional drones struggle. The system supports fine-scale forest mapping for wildfire response and land management while also advancing dual-use navigation tools for complex mission environments.
impact: Radiant is pushing the boundaries of remote sensing by enabling data collection in environments where satellites and traditional drones fail. Through autonomous navigation and advanced sensing, Radiant is unlocking new visibility in complex terrains by improving wildfire response, environmental monitoring, and mission-critical decision-making.
